I was only hesitant to buy this because of all of the reviews bashing performance and stability of the game. 3 Hours in, I have come across 0 crashes, visual bugs or glitches, or any frame rate drops (outside occasional fps drop right as you skip a cutscene, those drops don't last long and are not present if cutscene is played out and not skipped). Best Monster Hunter game so far. They removed and/or fixed almost everything that was bad about MH World and MH Rise, added amazing quality-of-life features, and made an incredible game.

Love this game, would definitely recommend it to anyone... unless your PC is absolute trash.

Also, I honestly don't get why so many people complain about crashes. I've got over 350 hours in this game and haven't had a single crash.

Played the game at launch on ps5 and it was a disaster. The bugs constant disconnecting and crashing were unreal. Fastforward to June 2026 after all the base game updates and it's like playing a brand new MH game. It is not perfect and there are still some performance issues but for me personally it has been a complete turn around compared to the experience
